The school of illusion features spells that manipulate perception.

Starting 6th when cast illusion that spell at levei, you an has duration 1 or you use of minute longer, can yaur a action change nature that of illusion the spell's to parameters lhe normal a rest, finishing long the by This you see illusion. increases ldl2. resistance immunity.

Beginning 10th level, you create an illusory duplicate of yourself that can react to danger. When a creature makes an attack roll against you, you can use your reaction to interpose the illusion between attacker and target. The attack automatically misses then the illusion dissipates. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a long rest.
